pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the base parent POM version to align with the new project structure.
Renamed the project artifact, name, description, and URLs from 'association-app' to 'ucronia-app'.
Updated SCM, issue management, and CI management URLs to reflect the new repository name.
Updated the GitHub Packages distribution management URL to the new repository name.
Changed the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Updated the manifest name property to match the new project artifact ID.
Added Apache POI dependency for Excel handling.
Added ArchUnit dependency for architecture testing.
Added AssertJ dependency for testing assertions.
Added custom framework validation dependency.
Added custom framework Spring WS starter dependency.
Added custom framework Spring WS security starter dependency.
Added custom framework architecture tests dependency.
Added Apache Commons Codec dependency.
Added Jakarta Validation API dependency.
Added SLF4J logging dependency.
Upgraded Spring Boot version to 3.4.6.
Upgraded Spring Data version to 2024.1.7.
Upgraded Spring Framework version to 6.2.8.
Updated the Maven site skin version.
Declared the custom validation framework dependency in the dependencies section.
Declared the custom Spring WS starter dependency in the dependencies section.
Declared the custom Spring WS security starter dependency in the dependencies section.
Declared the custom architecture tests dependency in the dependencies section.
Excluded Hibernate Validator from Spring Boot Starter Validation to use custom validation.

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Replaced a reusable workflow call for JDK 17 with a native matrix strategy to test against both JDK 17 and JDK 20.
Updated GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions (v4) for checkout and setup-java.
Explicitly configured the JDK distribution to use Temurin instead of relying on the default or previous configuration.
Added Maven dependency caching to the CI workflow to improve build performance.
Changed the Maven execution goal from the implicit default (likely test) to verify to include integration tests.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env to gitignore to prevent committing Docker environment variables.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the build stage base image from Maven with JDK 11 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin JDK 22 to support the target Java version.
Upgrade the deployment stage base image from OpenJDK 14 to Eclipse Temurin JRE 22 to match the target Java version.
Change the working directory from /usr/src/app to /app for a cleaner path structure.
Replace mvn dependency:resolve with mvn dependency:go-offline for more robust offline dependency caching.
Copy only source files instead of the entire context to improve Docker layer caching efficiency.
Add --batch-mode flag to Maven build command to ensure non-interactive execution in Docker.
Replace curl with wget in the health check command, as curl is not available in the alpine-based Temurin image.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: CMD wget -T5 -qO- http://localhost:8080/actuator/health | grep UP || exit 1

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a dedicated non-root user and group for running the application to improve security.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN addgroup -S runners && adduser --disabled-password -S runner -G runners

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a logs directory, assign ownership to the runner user, and expose it as a volume.
Switch the execution context to the newly created non-root runner user.
Update the COPY command path to reflect the new working directory structure.
Switch CMD to JSON exec form to ensure proper signal handling and process execution.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Restrict database and backend ports to localhost for improved security.
Correct the PostgreSQL healthcheck command to use the correct user flag.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed healthcheck test to use '-U postgres' instead of '-d db_prod'.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Mount SQL initialization scripts to ensure database schema is created on startup.
Move environment variables to a .env file for better configuration management.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'env_file: - .env' and removed inline sensitive/variable configs.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Persist application logs to a Docker volume for external access.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'association-logs' volume and mapped it to '/app/logs'.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Prometheus for metrics collection and monitoring.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'prometheus' service with config volume and port mapping.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Promtail to ship logs to Loki.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'promtail' service with config and log volume mappings.
Added 'loki' service with healthcheck and port mapping.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Grafana for visualization of metrics and logs.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'grafana' service with datasource and dashboard provisioning volumes.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Define explicit Docker networks to segment services.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'app', 'db', and 'monitoring' network definitions and assignments.

readme.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'Association App' to 'Ucronia App' to reflect the new association name.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# Ucronia App Backend' and description to 'Backend app for the Ucronía association.'

readme.md.general_idea: Remove documentation and Javadoc badges from the README to simplify the header.
readme.md.human_impl: Deleted lines containing [![Release docs]... and [![Release javadocs]... badges.

readme.md.general_idea: Simplify the documentation section by removing links to generated release/develop docs and javadocs.
readme.md.human_impl: Removed lists of links to [site-release], [javadoc-release], etc., and condensed the text.

readme.md.general_idea: Update local query URL and Docker project name to match the new project identity.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed query URL to 'http://localhost:8080' and docker project name to 'ucronia-backend'.

readme.md.general_idea: Add information about included monitoring tools in the Docker setup.
readme.md.human_impl: Added a 'Monitoring' section mentioning Grafana at http://localhost:3000.

readme.md.general_idea: Update GitHub and SCM links to point to the new repository name.
Remove link definitions for documentation sites that are no longer referenced.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Reorganized the master changelog to group includes by domain (General, Association, Inventory, Security) and added descriptive comments.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Added comments like '# General' and reordered include blocks.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Renamed the member structure changelog file to configuration.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Changed file: structure/member.yaml to file: structure/configuration.yaml

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Renamed the balance structure changelog file to association.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Changed file: structure/balance.yaml to file: structure/association.yaml

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Renamed the sequence structure changelog file to funds.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Changed file: structure/sequence.yaml to file: structure/funds.yaml

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Renamed the security structure changelog file to people.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Changed file: structure/security.yaml to file: structure/people.yaml

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Added a new changelog include for inventory structure.
Added a new changelog include for library structure.
Added a new changelog include for auth initialization from classpath.
Added a new changelog include for auth structure.
Removed the initial sequences changeset, likely migrated to a new file or no longer needed.
Removed the auth initial data changeset, likely migrated to the new auth initialization file.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Updated console appender pattern to include color highlighting and thread information for better readability.
Replaced static File appender with RollingFile appender to support log rotation based on time and size.
Configured specific policies for log file rotation including startup, size-based (10MB), and time-based triggers.
Added the file appender reference to the application logger to ensure logs are written to the rolling file.
Removed the unused Properties block defining the filename since the new RollingFile appender uses hardcoded paths.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to match the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use a schema prefix.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees ...

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and use 'person_id' instead of 'member_id'.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: Replaced INSERT INTO fees with INSERT INTO association.transactions and INSERT INTO association.fees, adding transaction_id foreign keys.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.general_idea: Updated test SQL data to reflect a schema change where fees are now linked to transactions and persons instead of members.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.human_impl: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees ...
